passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q. 1-5): A number arrangement machine, when given an input line of numbers, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is an illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement:
Input: 44 28 24 35 17 8
Step I: 8 2 6 1 7 5 4
Step II: 60 0 32 3 8 21 12
Step III: 6 0 5 3 9 3 3
Step IV: 7 4 14 13 34 39 52
Step V: 15 12 22 21 42 47 60
Step VI: 6 3 4 3 6 2 6

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What will be the 4th step of the following input?
Input: 23, 61, 15, 35, 54, 75, 85

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
In how many steps would the following arrangement be yielded by the given input?
Input: 61, 23, 21, 52, 31, 81

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The first step of the given Input is 7, 12, 11, 8, 6, 2, 4, 6. What will be the input?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What will be step IV for the following input?
10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Soln: Here, the rule followed is:
Step I: Digit-sum of input.
Step II: Add 8 to each number of the input.
Step III: Subtract 2 from each number of the input.
Step IV: Subtract 10 from each number of the input and square it.
Step V: Multiply each number of the input by 2 and subtract 10 from it.
Step VI: Multiply each number of the input by 2 and add 1 to each.
